facebook.content:
Worship is not just what we do on Sundays; it's a lifestyle. At IFM, we believe every day is an opportunity to encounter the living God. Join us in person at our monthly gatherings on the first Saturday of every month at 12 Noon, 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI.

Or, if you can't make it in person, tune in to our daily Hour of Power on Facebook Live, Mondays through Fridays at 8:15 AM. We're praying for you, and we can't wait to worship with you.

Who's joining us for the next Hour of Power?
facebook.fullPost:

Or, if you can't make it in person, tune in to our daily Hour of Power on Facebook Live, Mondays through Fridays at 8:15 AM. We're praying for you, and we can't wait to worship with you.

Who's joining us for the next Hour of Power?

Join us for worship

instagram.content:
Join us for worship and connection. Our First Saturday services are a time to refresh and revive with Pastor Curtis and the IFM community. In-person gatherings at 24301 Telegraph, Southfield MI at 12 Noon, and live online on Facebook at 8:15 AM every Monday-Friday.

Who's joining us in worship this week?
